title: HealthCode Connect API Contract
description: Single source of truth for data shapes between frontend and backend. The frontend ships a mock mode that serves exactly these shapes from backend/seeds.json; the real backend must match them. Dates are ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD). Money is GBP in pounds as numbers (not pence).

x-endpoints.GET /invoices: Returns Invoice[]. Optional query params: payer_type (private_insurer|nhs), status (PipelineStatus), q (search in invoice_number/patient_ref/insurer_name).
x-endpoints.GET /analytics/cashflow: Returns Cashflow: monthly received (actuals) and expected (projection from outstanding expected_payment dates).
x-endpoints.GET /analytics/compare: Returns Compare: per-payer-type rollups for the private-vs-NHS view.
x-endpoints.POST /invoices/{id}/resubmit: Fix-queue action: marks validation issues resolved, moves rejected -> at_medserv, appends a timeline event. Returns the updated Invoice.
x-endpoints.POST /invoices/{id}/reply: Fix-queue action: answers an insurer query, moves insurer_query -> with_insurer. Body: { message: string }. Returns the updated Invoice.
x-endpoints.POST /invoices/{id}/submit: Fix-queue action: submits a draft, draft -> at_medserv. Returns the updated Invoice.
x-endpoints.POST /invoices/{id}/chase: Fix-queue action: records a chaser to the insurer; sets last_chased_at. Returns the updated Invoice.
x-endpoints.POST /invoices/{id}/resolve: Fix-queue action: clears a shortfall balance after billing the patient or writing it off (amount_due -> 0). Returns the updated Invoice.
x-endpoints.POST /invoices/validate: Deterministic pre-submission validation. Body: a MedicalInvoice per the authoritative JSON Schema at backend/validation/schema.json. Returns { valid, issues: [{field, error, solution, severity, rule, path}] }; the field/error/solution subset is this contract's ValidationIssue.
x-endpoints.GET /xero/status: Existing endpoint, unchanged: Xero connection check.
x-endpoints.notes: Existing GET /xero/invoices and /xero/contacts stay as-is for raw Xero passthrough. New endpoints above serve the app; in the interim the backend may derive them from seeds.json exactly like the frontend mock does.

PipelineStatus.description: Lifecycle position. Draft (with the practice) -> At Medserv (billing agent) -> With insurer -> Paid. Rejected branches at Medserv validation; insurer_query means the insurer returned it asking for information. Overdue, stalled, and shortfall are derived deterministically from dates and amounts, not stored.

insurer_name.description: Insurer for private, 'NHS England' for NHS work.

patient_ref.description: Pseudonymous reference, never a full name.

middleman_fee.description: 3% clearing fee on private insurer invoices, 0 for NHS.

submitted_date.description: Date it left Semble for Healthcode.

query_reason.description: Set when pipeline_status is insurer_query: what the insurer asked for.

expected_this_month_by.description: Latest expected date inside the current month, for the hero headline.

overdue_total.description: Sum of amount_due where expected_payment_date is past.

stale_count.description: In flight with no stage change for 14+ days.

pipeline_totals.description: One entry per PipelineStatus with £ and count, for the pipeline money bar.

expected.description: Projection for current/future months from outstanding expected_payment dates.

aging.description: Outstanding £ by age of invoice since issue.
